description_long: This is a pair of low-top athletic sneakers with a predominantly white exterior and red accents around the collar. The shoes feature a standard lace-up closure with white laces and a rounded toe box, along with subtle perforations for breathability on the upper. The side panels have black outline details and a small circular emblem near the heel. The heel area displays a floral graphic with the word 'Arnt' beneath it, adding a unique decorative touch. The interior lining is black, and the outsole appears to have a textured grip pattern. The overall design is sporty yet casual, suitable for urban environments.
description: A pair of white low-top sneakers with red collars, black interior lining, and floral heel graphics, featuring standard laces and subtle black detailing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe boxes, white laces, and perforated upper details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the black outline details, circular emblem near the heel, and red collar accent.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the floral graphic and 'Arnt' text on the heel, as well as the black interior lining and red collar.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the black outline details, circular emblem, and red collar.
attribute_logo: circular emblem on the side near the heel, floral graphic with 'Arnt' text on the heel
